chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: What's up guys, today we will do another exercise  Let's see how much strength is there in this exercise  Let's go to the computer screen  And I want everyone to solve this exercise  Let's get started

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So I have come back with an exercise  And you have to make a library class  You have to make a class library  In which you can make some variables and methods  You have to make two variables, one is number of books

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And one is books  Books will be a list, I am telling you  And this is an integer, how many books are there  As you will add books with the help of methods  Similarly, the number of books variable should be an increment

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Now I know that the number of books variable  There was no need for this, because we can make it by len of books  But still you have to make it and make a method  Which will check that the number of books is equal to len of books  And if this does not happen

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then it will tell that your program  There is something wrong in it because your number of books and books  Which is different, in the same way you can make two or three libraries  From library class to library 1, library 2, library 3  And you finish this program and at the end of this I have asked a question

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: That does your program persist the books you have entered  After stopping the program  Means those books remain in the memory or not  And the answer to this is very simple, I will not tell you  But you guys see it yourself, I want you to feel it yourself

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And make me a library class  Very minimal object oriented programming program  So I will give you very little time to make it  So the solution to this exercise will come very soon  So if you have not seen the video on time

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then press the bell, whatever you do, watch the video on time  Secondly, this program should be like this  Whatever I am talking about in the video, your Apple should be open  Your Apple should be open and your program should start  So you guys start working

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: After watching the video, but if you have not accessed it yet  Then do it and do one thing for me  That in the first video you guys write a review  About this course and if you write a review  Then I will feel good from the heart because whoever is a new student

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Who wants to see this course, how much benefit will this course give them  They will know this thing that if they  If they see your review, then I want you to review this course  And if you do this  Then I will feel very good from the heart, rest you guys

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Do solve this question and I am saying again  I am not going to give this question in a lot of time  So I will give you the answer to this question very soon  So don't say that you didn't give time  So that's it for this video

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Thank you so much for watching this video  And I will see you next time
